channel.title: FixMyError.net – Recently Added Errors
channel.description: Newly added developer and infrastructure error fixes on FixMyError.net.

item.title: Auth0: Callback URL mismatch
item.description: Auth0 rejected the login because the redirect URL in the request is not in the application's Allowed Callback URLs. The match must be exact (scheme, host, port, path).

item.title: Okta: invalid_client
item.description: The Okta token endpoint returned invalid_client. The client_id/secret is wrong, the token endpoint auth method does not match, or the secret was rotated.

item.title: OIDC: nonce mismatch
item.description: The nonce in the returned ID token does not match the nonce sent in the auth request, indicating a replay or a session lost between request and callback.

item.title: WebAuthn/Passkey: registration failed (NotAllowedError)
item.description: navigator.credentials.create() rejected with NotAllowedError. Common causes: not a secure context, rpId not matching the origin, user cancelled, or timeout.

item.title: MFA: challenge timeout / code expired
item.description: A TOTP or push challenge was rejected because it expired or the device clock drifted outside the verification window.

item.title: Keycloak: Invalid parameter: redirect_uri
item.description: Keycloak rejected the redirect URI because it is not listed in the client's Valid Redirect URIs, or a wildcard pattern does not cover it.

item.title: Windows: 0xc000007b application unable to start correctly
item.description: A 32/64-bit mismatch or corrupt/missing runtime DLLs prevented the application from starting, often a wrong-bitness DLL on the PATH.

item.title: Windows: VCRUNTIME140.dll was not found
item.description: The Microsoft Visual C++ 2015-2022 runtime is missing. Apps compiled with MSVC need the matching redistributable installed.

item.title: Windows Update: error 0x80070643
item.description: A Windows Update (commonly a .NET or security update) failed to install, often due to a corrupted update cache or a pending reboot.

item.title: Windows: Access is denied (error 5)
item.description: A process attempted an operation without sufficient privileges, or a file/service is locked or restricted by its ACL.

item.title: Windows: RDP can't connect (CredSSP encryption oracle remediation)
item.description: Remote Desktop fails after a CredSSP update mismatch: one side is patched and enforcing while the other is not.

item.title: Windows: corrupted system files / component store
item.description: System instability or update failures caused by corruption in protected system files or the component store (WinSxS).

item.title: macOS: xcrun: error: invalid active developer path
item.description: The Command Line Tools path is missing or points to a removed Xcode, commonly after a macOS upgrade.

item.title: macOS: dyld: Library not loaded
item.description: The dynamic linker could not find a shared library at the path baked into the binary, often after a Homebrew upgrade changed library versions.

item.title: Homebrew: Permission denied @ /usr/local
item.description: Homebrew cannot write to its prefix because directory ownership is wrong, common on Intel Macs that use /usr/local.

item.title: macOS: notarization failed (notarytool)
item.description: Apple's notary service rejected the app, usually for unsigned/un-hardened binaries, a missing secure timestamp, or disallowed entitlements.

item.title: macOS: errSecAuthFailed / Keychain access denied
item.description: A code-signing or credential operation could not read the Keychain, common in CI when the keychain is locked or not in the search list.

item.title: macOS: zsh: command not found after Homebrew install (PATH)
item.description: A freshly installed CLI is not on PATH because the Homebrew shellenv was not added to the shell profile, common on Apple Silicon (/opt/homebrew).

item.title: FOUC: flash of unstyled content
item.description: The browser renders HTML before CSS or a web font is applied, producing a brief flash of unstyled or differently-styled content.

item.title: CORS: web font blocked by Access-Control-Allow-Origin
item.description: Fonts are fetched with CORS. A cross-origin font without the right ACAO header is blocked, leaving text in a fallback font.

item.title: Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS) too high
item.description: Visible elements move during load because images/ads/embeds have no reserved space, or fonts swap, hurting Core Web Vitals.

item.title: Astro: client hydration mismatch
item.description: An interactive island rendered different markup on the client than the server, or a client directive was missing, so hydration failed.

item.title: Remix/React Router: loader threw an unexpected Response
item.description: A loader or action threw a Response (e.g., redirect or 404) that was not handled, or returned a non-serialisable value.

item.title: Nuxt: Hydration node mismatch
item.description: Vue's server-rendered DOM did not match the client render, often from browser-only APIs during setup or invalid HTML nesting.

item.title: esbuild: Could not resolve "X"
item.description: esbuild could not find a module: it is not installed, the path/extension is wrong, or it is a Node built-in being bundled for the browser.

item.title: webpack 5: BREAKING CHANGE - polyfill for Node core module removed
item.description: webpack 5 no longer auto-polyfills Node core modules (crypto, stream, buffer). Browser builds importing them now fail to resolve.

item.title: 400 Bad Request
item.description: The server could not parse the request due to malformed syntax: bad JSON body, illegal headers/characters, oversized cookies, or invalid query encoding.

item.title: 429 Too Many Requests
item.description: The client sent too many requests in a given window and was rate limited. The Retry-After header, if present, says how long to wait.

item.title: 426 Upgrade Required
item.description: The server refuses to process the request using the current protocol and requires the client to switch (e.g., to TLS or to WebSocket).

item.title: 451 Unavailable For Legal Reasons
item.description: The resource is blocked for legal reasons such as censorship or a takedown. The response should reference the blocking authority.

item.title: Oracle: ORA-12541: TNS:no listener
item.description: The client reached the host but no listener is accepting on that port/service. The listener is down or the host/port/service name is wrong.

item.title: Cassandra: NoHostAvailable
item.description: The driver could not reach any node: wrong contact points, the node is down, a datacenter/consistency mismatch, or auth failure.

item.title: CockroachDB: restart transaction (SQLSTATE 40001)
item.description: A SerialisABLE transaction conflicted and must be retried. Contended transactions can be aborted with a retry error.

item.title: ClickHouse: Memory limit (total) exceeded
item.description: A query tried to use more memory than max_memory_usage (or the server total) allows, common with large GROUP BY/JOIN/ORDER BY.

item.title: PgBouncer: no more connections allowed (max_client_conn)
item.description: PgBouncer rejected a client because max_client_conn was reached, or the server pool (default_pool_size) is exhausted by long transactions.

item.title: Supabase/Postgres: new row violates row-level security policy
item.description: An insert/update was blocked because no RLS policy permits it for the current role, or the JWT lacks the expected claims (auth.uid()).

item.title: Argo CD: Application OutOfSync / Degraded
item.description: The live cluster state differs from Git (OutOfSync) or resources are unhealthy (Degraded), from drift, a failed sync, or invalid manifests.

item.title: Istio: 503 upstream connect error (UH/UF/NR)
item.description: Envoy returned 503 with flags like UH (no healthy upstream), UF (upstream connection failure), or NR (no route), usually mTLS, port-name, or selector issues.

item.title: Helm: another operation (install/upgrade) is in progress
item.description: A previous Helm operation crashed and left the release stuck in pending-install/pending-upgrade, blocking new operations.

item.title: Vault: server is sealed
item.description: HashiCorp Vault is sealed and cannot serve secrets. It seals on restart and must be unsealed with a quorum of unseal keys unless auto-unseal is configured.

item.title: Vault: permission denied (403)
item.description: The token's policies do not grant the requested path/capability, or the token expired. Vault denies by default.

item.title: Pulumi: the stack has pending operations
item.description: A previous update was interrupted, leaving operations indeterminate. Pulumi blocks further updates until state is reconciled.

item.title: Gemini API: response blocked (finishReason: SAFETY)
item.description: Gemini stopped generation because the prompt or candidate tripped a safety category threshold, leaving no usable text.

item.title: RAG: embedding dimension mismatch
item.description: Vectors written with one embedding model do not match the index/column dimension, so inserts or similarity queries fail. Mixing models is the usual cause.

item.title: pgvector: expected N dimensions, not M
item.description: A vector being inserted or queried does not match the fixed dimension declared on the vector column.

item.title: GitHub Copilot: authentication failed / no subscription
item.description: The Copilot extension cannot authenticate: the GitHub session expired, there is no active Copilot seat, or a proxy is blocking GitHub endpoints.

item.title: Mistral API: 422 Unprocessable Entity
item.description: The request body failed validation: unknown model name, malformed messages array, or an unsupported parameter value.

item.title: Elixir: GenServer call timeout (exited in :gen_server.call)
item.description: A GenServer.call did not get a reply within 5000ms (default) because the server is overloaded, doing slow work in handle_call, or deadlocked.

item.title: Elixir: Mix could not compile dependency
item.description: A dependency failed to compile due to missing native build tools, a version conflict, or stale build artifacts.

item.title: Scala: sbt unresolved dependency
item.description: sbt could not download a library: wrong coordinates, a missing resolver, a Scala-version suffix mismatch, or no credentials for a private repo.

item.title: Scala: value X is not a member of Y
item.description: You called a method that does not exist on the type, often a missing import for an extension method/implicit, or a more general type than expected.

item.title: Dart: Null check operator used on a null value
item.description: The ! null-assertion was applied to an expression that was null at runtime, throwing in null-safe Dart/Flutter code.

item.title: Flutter/Dart: pub get failed (version solving failed)
item.description: pub could not find a set of package versions satisfying all constraints, usually conflicting SDK or transitive dependency bounds.

item.title: Svelte: '$' prefix can only be used with stores
item.description: The $ auto-subscription was used on a value that is not a store (no subscribe method), or a store was referenced without importing it.

item.title: SvelteKit: 500 error in load function
item.description: A load function threw, returned a non-serialisable value, or accessed browser-only APIs during SSR, producing a 500.

item.title: Make: *** missing separator. Stop.
item.description: A recipe line is indented with spaces instead of a TAB, or a stray character precedes a rule. Make requires recipe lines to begin with a real TAB.

item.title: Bazel: no such target / no such package
item.description: A label does not resolve: the package has no BUILD file, the target name is wrong, or it is not visible to the caller.

item.title: Deno: PermissionDenied: Requires net/read access
item.description: Deno is secure by default and blocks file, network, and env access unless explicitly granted with --allow flags.

item.title: Bun: Cannot find module
item.description: Bun could not resolve an import: dependencies not installed, a path/extension typo, or a package relying on Node APIs not yet shimmed.
